affected_pattern: Recently activated accounts all show $0 for their first full billing cycle
root_cause: First-bill proration defect — a flag meant to zero the pro-rata partial cycle was incorrectly applied to the first full cycle as well, leading to $0 bills for newly onboarded accounts.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: First-Bill Proration Flag Misapplied pattern
Proration-flag code path introduced in release billing-engine 4.7
All affected customers have activation_date within last 35 days
recommended_action: Recompute first full cycle charges for all newly onboarded accounts
Issue corrective invoice with clear customer communication
Patch billing-engine to apply proration flag only to partial-cycle charges
Add unit test covering partial vs full-cycle proration branches
